title: Client order to factory run envelope v0 (PROPOSED)
description: Wraps a compiled p0_prompt_packet_v1.1 by reference; never mutates P0-PGR schemas.
laws: FOUNDER_CANON v1 + governed-autorun v3. Violations = BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.

envelope_id.description: Factory run id; equals factory_run.run_id in v0. Mirrors PKT-NNNN pattern.

created_at.description: machine-generated ISO-8601 UTC (datetime.now(timezone.utc)); never typed from memory

order.description: Layer-1 intake record. v0/CF-P1: only founder_session orders (order file at receipts/factory/orders/<ORD-ID>.json + founder authorization receipt in receipts/p0pgr/founder/) and manual workflow_dispatch; no network intake exists yet (TO BE BUILT, CF-P2).

channel.description: v0 valid in practice: founder_session only. founder_control_desk requires the Control Desk contract's Phase-2 explicit refactor doc (no order route exists in the 10 canonical routes today); client_workspace/api arrive CF-P2; studio_ide arrives CF-P2+ over the same Railway API + Supabase auth substrate as api (token-bound studio_ide actors). All non-founder channels NOT BUILT.

auth_ref.description: Identity binding (Supabase auth user id) required for all non-founder channels; null allowed for founder_session only. Client authority never exceeds their own run scope.

product_mode.description: factory_task = Mode 0, internal founder/governance deliverable with no client surface (the only mode exercised in CF-P1); workflow_builder = Mode A (activation of produced workflows is a separate founder-gated step); app_builder = Mode B (production deploy remains founder-gated, CF-P4+).

cost_cap_usd.description: Founder-adjustable per-run cap (default 5.00; per-line default 2.00). Breach halts the line, writes a PARTIAL receipt, and sends the run to QUEUED_FOUNDER_REVIEW (FT-CAPITAL).

classification.description: Classifier output preceding packet compilation. Confirms or overrides order.product_mode and order.venture; the classification values are authoritative for the run.

product_mode.description: Confirmed product mode (may override order.product_mode; the classification value is authoritative for the run).

venture.description: Confirmed venture (may override order.venture; the classification value is authoritative for the run).

line_plan.description: Ordered factory line ids (FL prefix mandatory; L1-L8 already means autonomy loops, TrustField cloud lines, and governance laws). Mirrored on the packet as label FL-plan:<FL ids>.

packet_ref.description: Reference to the compiled p0_prompt_packet_v1.1 (p0-pgr/P0_PROMPT_PACKET_SCHEMA_v1.json). The nine execution gates (cloud_only, read_only_or_reversible, roi_positive, no_deploy, no_external_send, no_legal_financial_commitment, no_p0_leakage, no_authority_change, founder_authorization_receipt) live in the packet and are NOT duplicated in this envelope. The envelope never mutates P0-PGR schemas (no_authority_change gate; FT-L5 forbids casual schema/gate mutation). Factory metadata (line_plan, sandbox spec) lives in the envelope, not inside the packet.

route.description: EXISTING route enum only. A dedicated CLOUD_FACTORY route is a PROPOSED v1.2 router amendment (founder-gated, requires synchronized edits to P0_PROMPT_PACKET_SCHEMA_v1.json, scripts/p0pgr_packet_lint_v1.py ALLOWED_ROUTES, and P0_DISPATCH_ROUTER_RULES_v1.md) and is NOT yet valid here.

lint_verdict.description: Existing R1-R9 packet lint applies unchanged; lint fail files a repair candidate and the lane continues (continuity law: never default to STOP).

sandbox.description: Sandbox allocation record; canonical copy lives in the sandbox ledger (one writer per task cell, second writer gets a REJECTED receipt, CAS per PARALLEL_AUTOMATION L1). Sandbox walls W1-W9 enforced by mechanical exit check scripts/check_sandbox_walls_v0.py (TO BE BUILT, CF-P1).

sandbox_id.description: Trailing 2 digits = allocation sequence, e.g. sbx-fr-0001-01

branch.description: sandbox/factory/fr-NNNN(-slug). Merges to main always pass full repo fences; sandbox/factory/* is NOT fence-exempt in v0 (adding it would be a policy/law mutation — PROPOSED amendment only). No direct main writes (repo fences + CODEOWNERS + W1 wall).

allowed_scope.description: Per-line file scope declared at allocation; out-of-scope writes fail the W9 wall at sandbox exit.

env_profile.description: Deny-by-default secret policy: raw secrets never enter the worktree environment; execution requiring a secret runs where the secret already lives. Build/code lines get NO send-capable credentials — makes the no_external_send gate structural.

timeout_seconds.description: Per-line default from FACTORY_LINE_REGISTRY_v0; run-level max 4h. Timeout kills the line and writes a PARTIAL receipt with limitations[] (continuity law: partial beats lost).

cost_cap_usd.description: Per-line default 2.00, per-run default 5.00; founder-adjustable via order.budget. Breach halts the line (FT-CAPITAL).

ledger_ref.description: Always the sandbox ledger (schema sandbox_ledger_v0) in v0.

status.description: BLOCKED_WITH_REASON only citing a HARD_BLOCK reason; failure otherwise degrades per continuity law order (tag confidence, reduce scope, sandbox, partial, provisional, retry-if-ROI-positive, review queue). Never default to STOP.

receipt_path.description: receipts/factory/<FR-ID>/<line_key>-<ISO8601Z>.json (schema factory_line_receipt_v0); null until written. Every line writes a receipt — no receipt sink = no line (governed-autorun L8/L11).

artifacts.description: Every artifact gets its sha256 recorded in the line receipt.

cost_usd.description: Rolls up: line receipt -> run receipt -> phase2 scorecard counters.cost_usd.

started_at.description: machine-generated ISO-8601 UTC; null until started

ended_at.description: machine-generated ISO-8601 UTC; null until ended

sandbox.description: null until allocated by the sandbox manager (SANDBOX_MANAGER_SPEC_v0.md, TO BE BUILT).

kind.description: FL7 produces PREVIEW ONLY. Production deploy is NOT part of the v0 substrate — FOUNDER_ONLY via existing paths (no_deploy gate; HARD_BLOCK reason 2).

approvals_required.description: Machine-checkable approval requirements, populated at classification. The run may enter APPROVED only when every approvals_required row has a matching approvals entry with decision APPROVED. Founder rows are mandatory for any scope touching production, spend, sends, or legal; client rows never exceed the client's own run scope.

scope.description: verbatim scope this approval must cover

approvals.description: Founder approvals route via the L8 Founder Approval Queue when built (approval_queue table exists; endpoints = ladder step D, NOT BUILT); interim sink receipts/factory/approval_queue_v0.json + QUEUED_FOUNDER_REVIEW. Client approval gates only their run's preview-to-deliver step; founder approval gates anything touching production, spend, sends, legal. Every founder decision writes a receipt with verbatim scope (M03 lesson).

verification.description: FL8 pass_rule: PASS only from a secondary CF account edge receipt (account b7282b4a5c17b84d62e3ef8866b878f8, worker sina-governance-ssot-advisory) — never builder self-report (autonomy loop L3). Any FL8 FAIL or deploy-truth drift writes a HOLD row that blocks further line dispatch for this run until resolved; production-facing hold resolution is a founder point.

verifier.description: FL8 execution targets: primary cloudflare_worker (secondary CF account read/verify path only; no new CF control plane in v0), secondary github_actions.

verdict.description: null until FL8 runs. BLOCKED_WITH_REASON is the canon's universal refusal token — a lawful FL8 refusal (wall/HARD_BLOCK event during verification) is recorded as such, never mislabeled FAIL.

external_receipt_ref.description: Reference to the externally-written verifier receipt; required for verdict PASS (PASS only from secondary CF account edge receipt).

report_path.description: null until the FL10 harvest report is written.

status.description: Lifecycle: RECEIVED -> CLASSIFIED -> PACKET_COMPILED -> QUEUED -> SANDBOX_ALLOCATED -> RUNNING -> PREVIEW_READY -> VERIFYING -> AWAITING_APPROVAL -> APPROVED -> RECEIPTED -> HARVESTED -> CLOSED. Exception states: REPAIR_CANDIDATE, HOLD_CLOUD_UNSAFE (label semantics: stays visible and re-rankable), QUEUED_FOUNDER_REVIEW, BLOCKED_WITH_REASON (must cite a HARD_BLOCK reason), KILLED.

chain_complete.description: Run cannot reach CLOSED unless chain_complete is true and every executed line has a receipt (governed-autorun L5). Receipts and artifacts are NEVER deleted.
